channel.title: Aaryan Patel — Blog
channel.description: AI/ML engineering, MLOps, cloud architecture, and platform insights.

item.title: My Business Plan For Website Design And Development
item.description: My business plan for creating websites for people and businesses, with pricing starting from $1500 and increasing based on content, features, and complexity.

item.title: Python Basics For Data Science Journey 2026
item.description: My journey completing the Python Basics for Data Science course and building a strong foundation for data science in 2026.

item.title: My Journey Practising Verbal Reasoning
item.description: Learning vocabulary to improve scores in Verbal Reasoning.

item.title: My First Harvard Business School Lesson: Resilient Leadership
item.description: My reflections on completing my first Harvard Business School Online lesson on resilient leadership.

item.title: Selective Entry Preparation 2026
item.description: A guide to selective entry preparation across key exam areas in 2026.
